task: Add Agent Chat Output window to Mission Control Dashboard
resolution: Modified `frontend/src/App.jsx` to split the right-hand column. Set the execution trace monitor to take the top half (`flex-1 h-auto` vs fixed height container via `flex-col gap-6`), and added an `AGENT_COMMUNICATION_LINK` window to the bottom half. Integrated socket listener `agent:message` to populate chat state with formatted text blocks.
non_obvious_patterns: The right column container height relied on a rigid `h-[calc(100vh-140px)]`. Adding `flex-col` to the wrapper and `flex-1` with `min-h-0` to the specific windows perfectly achieved a dynamic split with independent scrolling.
